summary: The user is learning about data science and has recently started a course on Coursera that covers data visualization, statistical inference, and regression analysis. They expressed interest in reinforcement learning and sought resources and applications in various industries, particularly finance and healthcare, while also discussing the optimization of data preprocessing and feature engineering in machine learning pipelines.
facts: The user started a course on Coursera last month that covers data visualization, statistical inference, and regression analysis. The user is particularly interested in exploring deep reinforcement learning. The user plans to explore the Coursera course on reinforcement learning by Sutton & Barto. The user wants to review the concepts of Markov decision processes and Q-learning to solidify their understanding before moving on to advanced topics. The user has been learning about the importance of data preprocessing and feature engineering in building accurate machine learning models.
